The '''''Rebel Star''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], and then utilized by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] till [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Huoba Neva]] was given command for it due to her actions in the [[Illoud system/Legends|Illoud system]].<ref name="DES">''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref>

After [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], and other [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] aboard the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Liberator'']] crash-landed on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], ''Rebel Star'' was sent along with the ''[[Antares Six]]'' and the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] to rescue them. The ''Rebel Star'' was destroyed in Coruscant's orbit after crashing into space debris that appeared to be part of a Star Destroyer.<ref name="Dark Empire 1" />
